title: Ground-penetrating Radar Sensor Fusion for Planetary Rover Localization
abstract: We present a decentralized multi-sensor fusion framework that integrates GPR, IMU, and odometry for rover localization in GPS-denied environments.

title: Self-Interference Cancellation Antenna Design for Full-Duplex 5G Systems
venue: IEEE Transactions on Antennas and Propagation
abstract: Design and measurement of a dual-fed microstrip antenna with integrated quadrature coupler providing >40 dB isolation for self-interference cancellation.
